name: Veritate 80M (default base model, two-phase QAT)
description: Base model trainer at 80M. Vanilla byte-level decoder (vocab=256), tuned for TinyStories coherence and fast iteration (~30-60 min phase A on 12 GB). Two-phase QAT recipe: train fp/bf base first (qat_enabled=false), resume with qat_enabled=true for the last ~25% of the budget. Exports to a v9 INT8 binary that loads cleanly on the C engine. Higher peak LR, larger batch, no activation checkpointing.
